notes.VAL-SPEC-001: SPEC.md Section 9.2, 9.2.1, and Appendix A enumerate 13 state types. schema.json type enum contains exactly 13 values. No discrepancy.
notes.VAL-SPEC-002: SPEC.md Section 6.5 and Appendix A enumerate Push, Pop, Replace, No, Modal (5 values). schema.json backStack enum contains same 5 values. No discrepancy.
notes.VAL-SPEC-003: SPEC.md Section 5.3 says 'SCREEN-<lowerCamelCaseName>' (first letter lowercase after SCREEN-). schema.json pattern '^SCREEN-[A-Za-z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$' accepts any letter at first position. Examples SCREEN-login, SCREEN-documentList, SCREEN-cardDetail are all valid. PASS.
notes.VAL-SPEC-004: SPEC.md Appendix A says 'STATE-<PascalCaseName>' with examples STATE-loading, STATE-empty-board. schema.json pattern '^STATE-[A-Za-z][a-zA-Z0-9-]*$' allows any letter at first position and hyphens. Examples valid. PASS.
notes.VAL-SPEC-005: SPEC.md Appendix A says 'ROLE-<PascalCaseName>' with examples ROLE-authenticated, ROLE-admin, ROLE-guest. schema.json pattern '^ROLE-[A-Za-z][a-zA-Z0-9]*$' accepts any letter at first position. Examples valid. PASS.
notes.VAL-SPEC-006: SPEC.md Section 6.5 and Appendix A enumerate Push, Pop, Replace, No, Modal. schema.json has same 5 values. Triple consistency achieved. PASS.
